title: Keyboard-First Wiring Mode
summary: Add complete keyboard workflow for circuit building: K key toggles keyboard wiring mode, Tab cycles through input nodes → placed gates → output nodes in topological order, Enter starts/completes wire connections, Escape cancels, number keys place gates with grid-snap preview. Status messages guide the user through the flow. A keyboard shortcut reference card section for wiring mode is added to the shortcuts overlay.

tasks.description: Add 'Keyboard Wiring' mode toggle (K key or button in toolbox). When active, show a status message. Store state in gameState._kbWiringMode boolean.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing K toggles _kbWiringMode on/off
A toolbox button also toggles it
Status bar shows 'Keyboard Wiring: ON' when active
Mode auto-disables when leaving gameplay screen

tasks.description: Tab cycles through: input nodes → placed gates → output nodes (in topological order). Shift+Tab goes backward. Only works when _kbWiringMode is true.
acceptance_criteria: Tab in KB wiring mode cycles input nodes, then gates, then output nodes
Shift+Tab cycles in reverse
_kbSelectedElement stores the currently highlighted element
Status bar updates with selected element name

tasks.description: Selected element gets prominent green highlight ring (different from mouse selection). Render in canvas.js.
acceptance_criteria: KB-selected element has a distinct pulsing green glow ring
Ring is visually different from mouse selection highlight
Ring disappears when KB wiring mode is off

tasks.description: Press Enter on selected element to start wire from it (selects first available output pin for input nodes/gates, first input pin for output nodes).
acceptance_criteria: Enter starts wire drawing from the KB-selected element's appropriate pin
Status message shows 'Wiring from: [element] → Select destination (Tab/Enter)'
Wire drawing state integrates with existing wireManager

tasks.description: After wire starts, Tab cycles through compatible destination elements only. Press Enter to complete wire connection.
acceptance_criteria: Tab only shows elements with compatible unconnected pins
Enter completes the wire connection to the selected destination
Undo/redo works for keyboard-created wires
Audio plays on wire completion

tasks.description: Show 'Wiring from: [source] → Select destination (Tab/Enter)' status message during KB wire drawing.
acceptance_criteria: Status message updates at each step of KB wiring
Message is clear about what action to take next

tasks.description: Escape cancels wire drawing in KB mode (same as mouse).
acceptance_criteria: Escape cancels KB wire drawing
Status message reverts to normal KB wiring prompt

tasks.description: Number keys (1-6) place gates at current cursor position with grid-snap preview when in KB wiring mode. Existing number key placement is enhanced.
acceptance_criteria: Number keys still place gates at canvas center (existing behavior preserved)
When a KB element is selected, gates place near that element

tasks.description: Add keyboard shortcut reference card section for wiring mode in the shortcuts overlay.
acceptance_criteria: Shortcuts overlay includes a 'Keyboard Wiring' section
Lists K, Tab, Enter, Escape shortcuts with descriptions

tasks.description: Cache bust all script and CSS tags to v34.
acceptance_criteria: All script/CSS tags have updated cache version
Service worker cache version is bumped

testing_focus: Complete wire creation via keyboard only
Interaction with mouse wiring when KB mode is active
Mode doesn't interfere with normal keyboard shortcuts (Enter for RUN, etc)
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced affecting normal gameplay, revert
